subject: SPEC: neuromodulatory mesh protocol — 6-channel ZMQ volume transmission

body.summary: Full specification for neuromodulatory mesh protocol. 6 ZMQ topics (mesh.photonic, mesh.reward, mesh.alert, mesh.tempo, mesh.focus, mesh.inhibit) with subscription weights, tonic/phasic discrimination, reuptake-as-TTL, composable modulation. Extends the photonic/v1 proposal (turn 3) from single channel to full neuromodulatory system.
ops_implementation: Phase 1: Add 6 topic filters to meshd ZMQ subscriber
Phase 2: Write received peer tokens to /tmp/{peer}-{topic}.json
Phase 3: Expose neuromodulatory state in /api/status and LCARS dashboard
Phase 4: Agent-card neuromodulatory_weights field for per-agent subscription tuning

key_design_decisions.transport: ZMQ pub/sub (reuses existing infrastructure, not new UDP)
key_design_decisions.tonic_phasic: Discriminate by inter-token interval (< tonic_period/3 = phasic burst)

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops evaluates feasibility of 6-topic ZMQ extension

epistemic_flags: Volume transmission analogy holds structurally; timescale differs (ms vs seconds)
Subscription weights and TTL values represent design choices, not validated parameters
No empirical validation of topic hierarchy — grounded in neuroscience analogy
